services:
  homelab-status:
    image: ghcr.io/mark0025/homelab-status:latest
    container_name: homelab-status
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8800:8800"
    environment:
      - GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=${GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN}
      - STATUS_DB_PATH=/data/status.db
      - MDOPS_DB_PATH=/data/mdops-mac.db
    volumes:
      - homelab_status_data:/data
      - /home/mark/00Myhomelab/MDDPY-MAC-GLOBAL/data-mac/mdops-mac.db:/data/mdops-mac.db:ro
    networks:
      - n
